rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/3/17. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of any petition filed conventionally to initiate a case needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T, 14.91F]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.
